problem: Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved
hypothesis: The key to Why is turbulent fluid flow mathematically unpredictable — Navier-Stokes unsolved is Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces — specifically Casimir effect between — which would help 1,000,000,000 people affected.
